scenarios.description: Reader overload with null context and non-empty fragment returns nodes list (context == null branch)
scenarios.precondition: Parser with FakeTreeBuilder that returns two nodes for parseFragment
scenarios.expectedResult: returns list of two nodes in order
pseudocode: TEST TC07 parseFragmentInput Reader null-context returns nodes
FakeTreeBuilder fb = new FakeTreeBuilder((rdr, ctx, uri, parser) -> Arrays.asList(nodeA, nodeB));

scenarios.description: String overload propagates UncheckedIOException thrown by TreeBuilder (exception path)
scenarios.precondition: Parser with FakeTreeBuilder that throws UncheckedIOException in parseFragment
scenarios.expectedResult: UncheckedIOException is thrown with original message
pseudocode: TEST TC08 parseFragmentInput String overload propagates UncheckedIOException
FakeTreeBuilder fb = new FakeTreeBuilder((rdr, ctx, uri, parser) -> { throw new UncheckedIOException(new IOException("tree failure")); });
throws UncheckedIOException with cause message "tree failure";

scenarios.description: Reader overload propagates RuntimeException thrown by TreeBuilder (exception path)
scenarios.precondition: Parser with FakeTreeBuilder that throws RuntimeException in parseFragment
pseudocode: TEST TC09 parseFragmentInput Reader overload propagates RuntimeException
FakeTreeBuilder fb = new FakeTreeBuilder((rdr, ctx, uri, parser) -> { throw new RuntimeException("fatal"); });
